title: Embers Unofficial Extended Life
description: A fork of a Dwarven-themed Magic Mod. With (even more) bugfixes and additions.
body: Welcome to our fork of the **Dwarven-themed Magic Mod Embers Rekindled**. Embers is best described as a dwarven magic tech mod. It features a smattering of magical and technical content, from staples such as ore doubling and item transport to alchemy and magical ray guns. All centered around the core mechanic of Ember, a form of power that you must extract from the world's core near bedrock. We know that there currently is a [maintained version of Embers](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled) for 1.20.x. This is why this mod will only ever support version 1.12.2. **Changes to Embers Rekindled v1.19** * added roughly 100+ new config options * various bugfixes from the [old bugtracker](https://github.com/DaedalusGame/EmbersRekindled/issues) * implemented most of the [old pull requests](https://github.com/DaedalusGame/EmbersRekindled/pulls) * switched to **[RetroFuturaGradle](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/RetroFuturaGradle)** * added native [GroovyScript](https://github.com/Ender-Development/Embers-Extended-Life/blob/rekindled/examples/postInit/embers.groovy) support **Planned Changes** * integration of Embers Addons to counter various dependency issues **Check out our forks of Embers Addons** * [Soot - UEL](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soot-extended-life) * [Aetherworks - UEL](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks-extended-life) **Credits:** * [BordListian](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/bordlistian) - Original Maintainer of the Embers Rekindled * [Elucent](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/elucent_) - Original Author of Embers [**![](https://files.readme.io/f10e57c-Diamond_Shaped3.png)**](https://www.akliz.net/enderman) This mod is published under MIT. (Same license [BordListian](https://github.com/DaedalusGame) originally choose.)
